mission.title: kubevela: Feat: Add a new CLI command: `vela top` which can display system information and resource status in UI form
mission.description:
### Description of your changes

Add a terminal based UI in KubeVela, which can provide users with friendly interaction and intuitive view of resources of application.

At present, the first version of this tool has been completed. Here is a demonstration of it:

![UI](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/30918851/182772784-f0ecf941-e712-46d4-b2fb-1ed60b68c816.gif)

As for the hierarchical division of display resources, at present, I have divided them into three levels, from high to low is application -> cluster -> k8s object. The three levels correspond to three views respectively. Each view is displayed in the form of a table, and the fields (header) to be displayed in each list are:

- Application
    - name
    - namespace
    - phase
    - create-time

- Cluster 
    - name
    - alias
    - type
    - endpoint
    - labels
    
- K8S object
    - name
    - namespace
    - kind
    - APIVersion
    - cluster
    - status

### Code design

#### View abstraction
The components

resolution.summary:
At present, the implementation of this tool is still a little simple, and the design is not very mature. It will be continuously improved in the follow-up. More functions will be added in the subsequent development.

**TODO**:

- Add a feature of displaying k8s object logs
- Add a feature of filtering objects according to namespaces
- Add port forwarding feature
